title: 非限定關係子句 , who / which...（補充說明）

formulas.zh: 主句敘述後，用逗號加who/which引導非限定子句，提供補充資訊
which可代替前面整個句子或名詞片語，繼續說明

explanation: 非限定子句以逗號與主句分隔，提供補充說明而非限制條件，去掉不影響主句完整意義。不可用that。who代替人物名詞，which代替事物名詞或整個前句。此用法常見於學測長文閱讀與寫作題。關鍵在於逗號的出現，區分此句型與限定子句（無逗號）的差異。

examples.eng: My English teacher, who has 20 years of experience, always explains grammar clearly.
examples.chi: 我的英文老師有20年的教學經驗，他總是把文法解釋得很清楚。

examples.eng: The novel was adapted into a film, which won several international awards.
examples.chi: 這部小說被改編成電影，該電影贏得了多個國際獎項。

examples.eng: She passed all her exams with excellent grades, which made her parents very proud.
examples.chi: 她以優異成績通過了所有考試，這使她的父母非常自豪。

examples.eng: The museum, which opened last year, attracts thousands of visitors monthly.
examples.chi: 這家去年開幕的博物館每月吸引數千名遊客。

extension.tip: 判斷是否為非限定子句：試著去掉逗號後的部分，若主句仍完整成立，則該子句為補充說明。限定子句（無逗號）用that，非限定子句（有逗號）不可用that。which常代替整個前句，表達結果或後續情況。

examples.test: ✗ The student who studied hard passed the test.
examples.result: → 限定子句，無逗號，表示「有哪個學生」；不可改為which

examples.test: ✓ The student, who studied hard, passed the test.
examples.result: → 非限定子句，有逗號，所有學生都通過，只是補充他很認真

examples.test: ✓ He won the competition, which surprised everyone.
examples.result: → which代替整個前句，表達出人意料的結果

extension.note: 逗號是關鍵：有逗號用who/which補充說明（可刪除），無逗號用that表限制條件（不可刪除）。

parts: founded the company 30 years ago, announced a new strategy yesterday.
exercises.sentence: The CEO, who founded the company 30 years ago, announced a new strategy yesterday.
exercises.translation: 這位30年前創辦公司的首席執行官昨天宣布了新策略。

parts: She completed the project on time,
exercises.sentence: She completed the project on time, which impressed her boss greatly.
exercises.translation: 她按時完成了專案，這讓她的老闆印象深刻。

parts: was written by a famous author, became a bestseller.
exercises.sentence: The book, which was written by a famous author, became a bestseller.
exercises.translation: 這本由著名作家撰寫的書成為了暢銷書。

parts: are all from different countries, enriched our class culture.
exercises.sentence: My classmates, who are all from different countries, enriched our class culture.
exercises.translation: 我的同學來自不同國家，他們豐富了我們班級的文化。
